compiled_state.title: RED: Add test cases for refactoring survival and suite-level value rejection criteria in red-test-evaluator
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Modify existing test file to add test cases for the two new rejection criteria being added to the red-test-evaluator agent.

### Steps
1. Add test case for refactoring survival criterion: create a test fixture where a submitted RED test would break under a semantics-preserving refactoring (e.g., renaming an internal variable). Assert the evaluator rejects with a finding referencing refactoring survival.
2. Add test case for suite-level value criterion: create a test fixture where a submitted RED test is redundant with existing suite coverage (same behavior already asserted by another test). Assert the evaluator rejects with a finding referencing suite-level value.
3. Add .test-index RED marker for new test cases.

### Test Approach
Tests create controlled evaluator input fixtures (writer rejection payload + context envelope) and assert the evaluator's verdict output includes the new rejection criteria. Behavioral — exercises evaluator decision logic.

### File Impact
- `tests/agents/test-red-test-evaluator.sh` — Edit (add 2 test cases)
- `.test-index` — Edit (add RED marker)

## Testing Mode
RED

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Test for refactoring survival rejection exists
  Verify: grep -q "refactoring.survival\|refactoring_survival" tests/agents/test-red-test-evaluator.sh
- [ ] Test for suite-level value rejection exists
  Verify: grep -q "suite.level\|suite_level" tests/agents/test-red-test-evaluator.sh
- [ ] RED marker in .test-index
  Verify: grep -q "\[evaluator_alignment" .test-index
- [ ] Tests FAIL against current evaluator (RED state)
  Verify: { bash tests/agents/test-red-test-evaluator.sh 2>&1 | grep -q "FAIL"; }
